title: MCDF encryption/policy.yaml
description: Declares what is encrypted and how the content-encryption key (CEK) is wrapped per recipient. Key material is never stored in plaintext.

method.description: Content encryption. Each file is stored as nonce(12) || ciphertext || tag(16), with the member path as AAD.

key_management.description: CEK wrapping. hpke = RFC 9180 base mode, DHKEM(X25519,HKDF-SHA256)/HKDF-SHA256/AES-256-GCM.

encrypted_files.description: Container-relative paths whose bytes are ciphertext.
